name: robbie
description: Robbie Virtual - asistente de escritorio local para macOS (Fase 1: arquitectura base)

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @robbie/shared && concurrently -k --names shared,server,client --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @robbie/shared" "npm run dev -w @robbie/server" "npm run dev -w @robbie/client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @robbie/shared && npm run dev -w @robbie/server
scripts.dev:tauri: concurrently -k --names server,tauri --prefix-colors green,blue "npm run dev:server" "npm run tauri dev"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @robbie/shared && npm run build -w @robbie/server && npm run build -w @robbie/client
scripts.test: npm run build -w @robbie/shared && npm run test -w @robbie/shared && npm run test -w @robbie/server && npm run test -w @robbie/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @robbie/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
